Survey.Title: Survey Questionnaire
Survey.Description: This survey questionnaire pertains to an independent study which is being conducted in collaboration with Institute of Space Technology (IST) and National University of Science and Technology (NUST). It intends to investigate the effect of supportive university entrepreneurial ecosystem's effect on the entrepreneurial intentions and the role of social intelligence, digital literacy and self-efficacy. Please tick one of the options given in each question. The questionnaire will take approximately 6-8 minutes to attempt. The data provided in this questionnaire will remain strictly private and will not be shared with anyone.

Question.Text: Gender
Age
Education
Name of the University
Type of University
I am ready to do anything to be an entrepreneur
My professional goal is to become an entrepreneur
I will make every effort to start and run my own firm
I am determined to create a firm in the future
I have very seriously thought of starting a firm
I have the firm intention to start a firm some day
My university offers elective courses on entrepreneurship
My university offers project work focused on entrepreneurship
My university offers internship focused on entrepreneurship
My university offers a bachelor or master study on entrepreneurship
My university arranges conferences/workshops on entrepreneurship
My university brings entrepreneurial students in contact with each other
My university creates awareness of entrepreneurship as a possible career choice
My university motivates students to start a new business
My university provides students with ideas to start a new business from
My university provides students with the knowledge needed to start a new business
My university provides students with the financial means to start a new business
My university uses its reputation to support students that start a new business
My university serves as a lead customer of students that start a new business

Section.name: Entrepreneurial Skills
Section.Instruction: How do you rate yourself on the following entrepreneurial abilities/skill sets?

Question.Text: Recognition of opportunity
Creativity
Problem solving
Leadership and communication skills
Development of new products and services
Networking skills, and making professional contacts
I am confident in my ability to successfully identify new business opportunities
I am confident in my ability to create new products
I am confident in my ability to successfully perform the various roles and tasks of entrepreneurship
I am confident in my ability to successfully commercialize an idea or new development
I am confident in my ability to think creatively
I can identify and use appropriate sources in digital environments based on my information needs
I can use search strategies in digital environments
I can retrieve information that I have stored from different environments
I can store digital information and data securely
I can communicate using different digital tools
I can edit files and documents collaboratively with others using digital tools
I can apply behavioral rules in digital interactions and collaborations
I can actively participate in society using digital media
I can share my experiences with digital tools in interactions with others
I know about the dangers and risks in digital environments and consider them
I can protect my privacy in digital environments through appropriate measures
I can regularly update my security settings
I can use digital technologies in a healthy way (e.g., limited daily usage, setting boundaries)
I can use digital tools and platforms according to my needs
I can adapt digital tools for personal use
I can independently use digital learning opportunities and appropriate tools
I can organize digital learning resources independently
